string.text: Kill Gunslinger.
I don’t remember anything. There's only one entry in the PDA: kill the Gunslinger. I need to find out who the Gunslinger is and why I wanted to kill him.
Get the flash drive
The trader wants me to get valuable intel on a flash drive. Fox has it, but he was captured by the Bandits. I should go to Wolf and get his help.
Return the flash drive to the trader
I have the flash drive. Time to return it to the trader.
Repel the bandit counterattack on the ATP
I need to deal with the bandits who are counterattacking the ATP.
Talk to Wolf
A scout carrying important information for the trader has gone missing. Sidorovich said that Wolf should know where Fox is now.
Meet Wolf's men
Fox was captured by bandits who are holed up at the ATP. Wolf’s fighters will assist in the assault on the bandits.
Eliminate the bandits at the ATP
We need to deal with the bandits who kidnapped Fox.
Eliminate the bandits at the ATP
We need to deal with the bandits who kidnapped Fox.
Return the flash drive to the trader
I have the flash drive. It's time to return it to the trader.
Job for the trader
Sidorovich offers a special mission. I need to return to him and learn more about it.
Meet the guide
Sidorovich sent me to his contact. He is supposed to guide me through the railway embankment tunnel.
Cross the embankment
To move forward, I need to get past the railway embankment. The main path is guarded by the military.
Ask Fox about the Gunslinger
According to the trader, a stalker named Fox might know something about the Gunslinger.
Steal the case from the checkpoint
There’s a case at the military checkpoint with reports about an expedition to the northern Zone. I need to steal the case and deliver it to the trader.
Defend the rookie village from mercenaries
The mercenaries want to evict the stalkers from the village. But the stalkers aren’t going to give in. I need to help defend the village from the mercenary attack.
Meet with the Doctor
According to the Guide, the Doctor is in the Gunslinger’s group's hideout. I’ll have to return to the underground area beneath Agroprom and meet with the Doctor.
Meet with Wolf
I should go talk with Wolf
Kill the bandits at the factory.
Kill the bandits holed up in the factory.
Kill all the bandits at the factory.
Talk to the trader.
Talk to Wolf.
Steal the box from the Army outpost.
Steal the box with important documents from the Army outpost.
Steal the box from the Army outpost.
Take the box to the trader.
Protect the rookie camp from the Mercs.
Protect the rookie camp from the Mercs.
Destroy the Mercs.
Talk to the commander of the rookies.
Kill the bandits at the car park.
Kill the bandits at the car park and report to Wolf.
Meet with Wolf's people.
Kill all the bandits.
Talk to Wolf.
Learn something about Strelok from Fox.
Help the wounded Stalker.
Help Fox.
Get information about Strelok.
Deliver the package to the trader.
Deliver the package to the trader.
Meet with Seriy.
Meet with Seriy at the Garbage.
Meet with Doctor.
Meet with Doctor.
Meet with Doctor at Strelok's hiding place.
Kill Strelok.
Find Strelok.
Find an artifact.
Find your first artifact.
Find an artifact.
Take the artifact to the trader.
Get information from the scout.
Take the information to the trader.
Talk to Wolf.
Get the flash drive from Nimble.
Take the flash drive to the trader.
Work for the trader.
Get the special task from the trader.
Work for Barkeep.
Ask Barkeep for a job.
Help the scientists.
Offer help to the scientists.
Get to the railroad embankment.
Meet the journeyman.
Traverse the railroad embankment.

Before heading deeper into the Zone, it's necessary to traverse the old railroad embankment. The only safe passage there is guarded by the military. However, there's a small tunnel to the left - rookies usually go through it. There you'll be awaited by one of my debtors.
